event: Close-up study of a pine tree branch
symbols: evergreen pine — enduring life and constancy through all seasons
description: A vertical close-up study of a large pine branch filling most of the composition. Dense clusters of long green needles radiate from pale, twisting branches. The needles range from deep green to golden-green where sunlight catches them. A strip of clear blue sky with light clouds is visible at the upper right. The trunk and a secondary branch are visible at the lower portion. The rendering is highly detailed with individual needles discernible.
